title: Universal Hobby Number and Letter Stamping Set Automatic Punch Crafts 38 Pieces
description:
Add letters and numbers to your metal-working projects with the Universal Hobby 38pc Letter/Number Stamping Set! This set comes with 26 uppercase letters, numbers 0-9, a period punch (".") and an ampersand ("&") sign. Additionally, we've included an automated spring-loaded punch so that you can be sure your stamps come out perfectly. The punch itself is about 6.5" in length. All of the pieces fit neatly inside of a durable plastic storage case, with slots for each piece to keep them organized when not in use. This is a must-have tool set for marking soft metal, plastic, leather and even wooden items!

Universal Hobby Number and Letter Stamping Set Automatic Punch Crafts 38 Pieces

Add letters and numbers to your metal-working projects with the Universal Hobby 38pc Letter/Number Stamping Set!

Key Features

  • Letters & Numbers Stamping Set - 38 Total Pieces
  • Comes with Uppercase Letters A - Z, Numbers 0-9, Period Stamp (.) and Ampersand Stamp (&)
  • Automated Spring-loaded Punch
  • Size of Stamps: 1/8"
  • Durable Carry Case w/ Slots for Each Piece

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 38UHLNSTMP
  • UPC: 060886292739
  • Color: Red
  • Size: 7.5 in x 5 in
